description: A unique option to go with your ethnic outfits, this quirky antique-look box purse from yelloe will ensure you turn heads for all the right reasons.Dimensions :10 cm x 14 cmMade of moulded metal for durability and unique styleHinge opening with clasp fasteningOne zipped inner pocket and velvet liningLong chain strapCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
